enable_patrols.name: Enable NPC Patrols
enable_patrols.hint: Master toggle for all NPC patrol behavior.

movement_speed.name: Movement Speed
movement_speed.hint: Token animation speed in pixels per second.

stagger_delay.name: Stagger Delay
stagger_delay.hint: Milliseconds of delay between sequential NPC movements to avoid visual chaos.

proximity_radius.name: Default Proximity Radius
proximity_radius.hint: Default radius in grid squares for auto-generated proximity regions around NPCs.

ambient_cooldown.name: Ambient Dialog Cooldown
ambient_cooldown.hint: Seconds before an NPC repeats ambient dialog to the same player.

combat_freeze.name: Freeze Patrols in Combat
combat_freeze.hint: When enabled, all NPCs with combat_behavior 'freeze' stop moving during combat.

patrol_manager.title: NPC Patrol Manager
patrol_manager.tooltip: Manage NPC patrol paths and schedules

panel.title: NPC Patrol Manager
panel.no_paths: No patrol paths defined for this actor.
panel.no_waypoints: No waypoints in this path yet.
panel.select_actor: Select an NPC token or actor to manage their patrol paths.
